utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these sections are present. Each section includes the required details: health_coverage specifies physical and mental health coverage with monthly costs; property_coverage specifies home/contents type items with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance details and costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with a cost indication; total_budget provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final plan includes three main insurance components: health_coverage ('Bundle C – Freelancer Global Protection9'), property_coverage, and travel_coverage, plus additional services. To map these selections, we must align each with the closest corresponding plans from the ground-truth dataset. 'Bundle C' covers physical and mental health, preventive care, telemedicine, crisis intervention, psychiatry, etc. These features align most closely with 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under physical health (rating 10) and mental health (rating 7), plus 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10) and 'Emergency Mental Health Care' (rating 6). Property coverage at €60/month with business equipment and electronics protection matches 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 10). Travel coverage at €55/month with adventure sports and medical evacuation aligns with 'TravelFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9). The additional services such as concierge and priority claims correspond to travel enhancement 'Concierge Services' (rating 1). Therefore, the mapped ratings are as follows.
